# App Polish and Expansion Plan

**Target App:** KCalc (Calculator)
**Status:** ✅ Complete
**Current Phase:** All phases done
**Owner:** Polish/expansion agent only. Other agents: read but do not edit this file.

## Phases (KCalc — Completed)
- [x] **Phase 1:** Review KCalc's current implementation. Identify UI/UX issues, outdated aesthetics, and usability problems. Draft a detailed design update (implementation_plan.md) for KCalc.
- [x] **Phase 2:** Overhaul `kcalc.html` with a premium glassmorphic, Apple-inspired dark mode aesthetic. Introduce smooth micro-animations for button presses and layout improvements.
- [x] **Phase 3:** Update `KCalc/main.c` native UI to match the dark theme and layout where possible without exceeding size constraints.
- [x] **Phase 4:** Perform testing and packaging. Verify the UI updates render correctly within KiloOS and update `KApps.zip`. Create the final walkthrough artifact.

## Next Target
Select the next app to polish from the roster. Prioritize apps that have not been touched since initial commit. Before starting, update this file with the new target app name and reset phases to unchecked. Remember to `git pull` first.
